---
title: "Non-Motorized Sensitivity — 2026"
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, "..")
import report_data as rd
import pandas as pd
from IPython.display import Markdown, display

RUN_SET_ID = "non-motorized-2026"
description = rd.run_set_description(RUN_SET_ID)
runs = rd.latest_run_per_scenario(RUN_SET_ID)
```

**[← All run sets](../index.qmd)**

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
if description:
    display(Markdown(description + "\n"))
```

## Scenario summary

```{python}
#| echo: false
if not runs:
    print("No runs recorded yet.")
else:
    rows = []
    for run in runs:
        overrides = rd.all_overrides(run)
        rows.append({
            "Scenario": run["scenario_id"],
            "Description": overrides.get("RunDescription", ""),
            "Status": run["status"],
            "TDM version": run["tdm"].get("resolved_tag") or run["tdm"]["resolved_commit"][:8],
            "Run ID": run["run_id"],
        })
    display(pd.DataFrame(rows))
```

## Run details

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
for run in runs:
    sid = run["scenario_id"]
    overrides = rd.all_overrides(run)
    desc = overrides.get("RunDescription", sid)
    display(Markdown(
        f"### {sid} — {desc}\n\n"
        f"**Status:** {run['status']}  \n"
        f"**Run ID:** `{run['run_id']}`  \n"
        f"**TDM version:** {run['tdm'].get('resolved_tag') or run['tdm']['resolved_commit'][:8]}\n"
    ))
    outputs = rd.curated_output_paths(run)
    if outputs:
        links = "\n".join(f"- [{p}](../../{p})" for p in outputs)
        display(Markdown(f"**Curated outputs:**\n\n{links}\n"))
    else:
        display(Markdown("_No curated outputs recorded._\n"))
```
